name: Either
summary: Utility methods for working with Either instances.

methods.name: Left(TLeft)
methods.summary: Creates a new IEither(TLeft, TRight) instance containing a Left value.

params.name: value
params.doc: Left value to be stored in the new IEither(TLeft, TRight) instance.

methods.name: Match(Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TLeft, TRight>, System.Action<TLeft>, System.Action<TRight>)
methods.signature: void Match<TLeft, TRight>(Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TLeft, TRight> either, System.Action<TLeft> leftAction, System.Action<TRight> rightAction)
methods.summary: Performs an given Action based on whether the IEither(TLeft, TRight) contains a Left or Right value.

params.name: leftAction
params.doc: Action used for a Left value.

params.name: rightAction
params.doc: Action used for a Right value.

methods.name: Right(TRight)
methods.summary: Creates a new IEither(TLeft, TRight) instance containing a Right value.

params.name: value
params.doc: Right value to be stored in the new IEither(TLeft, TRight) instance.

methods.name: SelectLeft(Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TOldLeft, TRight>, System.Func<TOldLeft, TNewLeft>)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TNewLeft, TRight> SelectLeft<TOldLeft, TNewLeft, TRight>(Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TOldLeft, TRight> either, System.Func<TOldLeft, TNewLeft> selector)
methods.summary: Return an IEither(TNewLeft, TRight) instance by either passing the contained Left value to a conversion function, or propagating the Right value.

params.name: selector
params.doc: Function used to convert a Left value.

methods.name: SelectRight(Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TLeft, TOldRight>, System.Func<TOldRight, TNewRight>)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TLeft, TNewRight> SelectRight<TLeft, TOldRight, TNewRight>(Dynamo.Utilities.IEither<TLeft, TOldRight> either, System.Func<TOldRight, TNewRight> selector)
methods.summary: Return an IEither(TLeft, TNewRight) instance by either passing the contained Right value to a conversion function, or propagating the Left value.

params.name: selector
params.doc: Function used to convert a Right value.
